## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor (code improvement without functional changes)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement (please include screenshots below)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md) of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings in `pnpm lint`.
- [ ] I have verified that the UI remains accessible (WCAG 2.1 AA).
- [ ] (If UI change) I have tested the changes on both Dark and Light modes.

## Screenshots / Screen Recordings

*(If applicable, please provide visual evidence of your changes)*

## Performance impact

- [ ] I have checked that this change does not negatively impact Lighthouse scores (>95).
